examples: For that minute, a blackbird sang close by and round him.
I have seen a kestrel flying over the Deptford gasworks, and I have heard a first-rate performance by a blackbird in Euston Road.
A blackbird flew down and perched on the parapet outside his window.
Around 80 swap houses subscribe to Blackbird, though few admit to using it much.
Mr Spencer has his fingers in several pies, including Blackbird, in which Garban has a 19% stake.
